scripts.dev: npm run build:client && npm run dev:server
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.bd-bg: mbt build -p=cf --mtar=btp-status.mtar && cf deploy mta_archives/btp-status.mtar -f --retries 1 --strategy blue-green --skip-testing-phase
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=client && npm run typecheck --workspace=server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=client && npm run test --workspace=server
